title: Extracting Dates from Text
scenario: Write a Python function to extract dates from a given text. The text may contain multiple dates in different formats. The function should return a list of extracted dates in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD'.
constraints: Must use a Python function definition
Must use a regular expression to extract dates

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the function uses a Python function definition and a regular expression to extract dates.
Verify that the function has correct Python syntax.
Check if the function correctly extracts dates from the text.
